product: Genie Spaces will be renamed to Genie Agents
tagline: Genie Spaces is being renamed to Genie Agents.
what_it_does: Genie Spaces is being renamed to Genie Agents. In early July 2026, Genie Spaces is renamed to Genie Agents to better reflect the full capabilities of this feature.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Genie Spaces is being renamed to Genie Agents.
